meaning: n.否认者,法国旧银币,极少量的金额,极微量
examples: The Denier will outright deny any benefit to Agile or their interest in moving to it.
Filament yarns are numbered not by the yarn number system, but by the denier system.
Thus a filament yarn is characterized by its denier and the number of fibers in the yarn.
Which is perhaps why Mrs Lincoln, though no climate-change denier, is less than thrilled by the Waxman-Markey bill.
And Greenberg is a reality denier like few others.
